html:
Exclusive to:

ColdLukewarmWarmHot

“Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm the holder depending on its temperature.

When hot, it does extra damage towards freezing targets.

Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

-

The Searing Shovel is a Tool that can be used to dig like any other Shovel. It can be crafted at an Alchemy Engine using four Twigs, two uncooked Heat Glands, and three Nitre.

The Searing Shovel can be heated like a Thermal Stone. It does not gain benefits from being hot, as nothing requires more than one use of a Shovel.

The Searing Shovel passively heats the holder, like a Thermal Stone, and glows when it is warm or hot. However, the holder also directly gains temperature when shoveling, which can cause Overheating.

The Searing Shovel does not take durability damage from use. Instead, it takes 25% durability damage when it becomes too cold, needing to be restored to above 60 degree before it can be used again.

The Searing Shovel deals extra damage to freezing targets, up to double damage towards targets not frozen solid, and triple damage against a target that's frozen solid. As usual, striking a frozen-solid target will instantly thaw them out. However, the Searing Shovel's very low base damage means even a frozen target will take less damage than a Tentacle Spike deals.

Trivia

  • The Searing Shovel was called the "Thermic Shovel" during the beta
  • In the code, the digging efficiency of Searing Shovel improves when it is warm or hot. But in the comment, dev notes say nothing in the game needs more than 1 dig work, so Warm/Hot does not speed up digging in practice.

Assets

  • Stage 4
  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down
  • Broken
  • Reheating
  • Stage 4
  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down

Exclusive to:
ColdLukewarmWarmHot
“It's cold and brittle.”
–Wilson
“It's not looking so good...”
–Willow
“Is cracking apart.”
–Wolfgang
“It's not long for this world...”
–Wendy
“WARNING: LOSING STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY”
–WX-78
“It may require repairs soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's aboot to break apart.”
–Woodie
“It won't hold together much longer.”
–Maxwell
“It shall nöt weather much further use.”
–Wigfrid
“Uh-oh... is it gonna break?”
–Webber
“It's beginning to crumble.”
–Warly
“Going to break!”
–Wormwood
“It's lookin' a little flimsy.”
–Winona
“The cracks are beginning to show, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It gonna break, florp!”
–Wurt
“Uh oh. Looks like it's about to break...”
–Walter
“Its time is nearly up.”
–Wanda
“I think it's losing steam.”
–Wilson
“Awwwww, where did all that beautiful heat go?”
–Willow
“Is cooled off now.”
–Wolfgang
“It has lost the warmth it once had.”
–Wendy
“HEAT OUTPUT: NEGLIGIBLE”
–WX-78
“Its temperature has diminished significantly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Fizzled out, eh?”
–Woodie
“Without heat, it's hardly different from an ordinary shovel.”
–Maxwell
“The fire burns löw within it.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, where did the heat go?”
–Webber
“It's getting cold.”
–Warly
“No more warm?”
–Wormwood
“It's coolin' off.”
–Winona
“What's the harm? It's barely warm!”
–Wortox
“Hey! How come not warm anymore?”
–Wurt
“It's barely warm.”
–Walter
“It's barely warm.”
–Wanda
“It's all warmed up!”
–Wilson
“I'm never using any other shovel ever again.”
–Willow
“Is good at keeping Wolfgang nice and warm.”
–Wolfgang
“I can find some small comfort in its warmth.”
–Wendy
“A SHOVEL AND A HEATER. I RESPECT A MULTITASKER”
–WX-78
“It keeps its user comfortably warm while working.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's like wearin' a cozy pair of long johns while I work.”
–Woodie
“If I must do physical labor, I can at least do it in relative comfort.”
–Maxwell
“It öffers respite fröm the cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps us warm while we do our chores.”
–Webber
“It keeps my hands pleasantly warm.”
–Warly
“Warm digger”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' warms you up like some hard work.”
–Winona
“It keeps the cold from taking hold.”
–Wortox
“So warm! Gimme!”
–Wurt
“It'll keep me warm while I'm digging!”
–Walter
“It makes the work nice and cozy.”
–Wanda
“It's a hot commodity.”
–Wilson
“I like my tools scalding hot.”
–Willow
“Hot shovel make Wolfgang feel the burn!”
–Wolfgang
“The hottest flames burn out the quickest...”
–Wendy
“SUPERHEATED FOR MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“It helps perform tasks quickly, if one can withstand the heat.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's hot, but it gets the job done fast.”
–Woodie
“I despise working up a sweat...”
–Maxwell
“It still bears the heat öf the förge!”
–Wigfrid
“It singes the hairs on our fingies!”
–Webber
“It cuts through dirt like a hot knife through butter!”
–Warly
“Ah! Hot!!”
–Wormwood
“Anybody got some safety gloves?”
–Winona
“Its heat can't be beat.”
–Wortox
“It good digger, but hurt claws!”
–Wurt
“Wow, I can feel the heat from here!”
–Walter
“Incredibly hot, but wonderfully efficient!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Xẻng Searing là một Công cụ có thể được sử dụng để đào giống như bất kỳ Xẻng nào khác. Nó có thể được chế tạo tại Máy luyện kim bằng cách sử dụng bốn Cành Cây, hai Tuyến Nhiệt chưa nấu chín và ba Tiêu Nitre.
